requirement_topic.en: SCCT Radio Type Approval and Frequency Permit — Tajikistan Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: SCCT无线电型号核准与频率许可——塔吉克斯坦电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: SCCT無線電型號核准與頻率許可——塔吉克斯坦電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment placed on the Tajikistan market must obtain type approval and, where applicable, a frequency permit from SCCT (Service for Communications, Communications and Telecommunications — Хизмати алоқа, коммуникатсия ва технологияҳои иттилоотӣ), the body responsible for radio spectrum management and telecom regulation in Tajikistan. SCCT type approval is a Tajikistan-specific national requirement and is entirely separate from any EAEU-based approval — Tajikistan is not a member of the EAEU and EAC marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 is not applicable. Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz and 5 GHz), Bluetooth, Zigbee, cellular (3G/4G/5G), and other radio-frequency devices are all within scope. A separate SCCT frequency permit is required for 5 GHz Wi-Fi and other licensed-band radio technologies. Applicants must submit technical documentation and test reports from an accredited laboratory. Russian-language technical documentation is generally accepted. The approval must be obtained before the product is imported and sold in Tajikistan.
summary.zh: 所有投放塔吉克斯坦市场的无线电及电信终端设备，均须取得SCCT（通信、通信与信息技术服务——Хизмати алоқа, коммуникатсия ва технологияҳои иттилоотӣ）的型号核准，并在适用情况下取得频率许可。SCCT负责塔吉克斯坦无线电频谱管理及电信监管。SCCT型号核准是塔吉克斯坦特有的国家要求，与任何基于EAEU的核准完全分离——塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国，TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC标志不适用。Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、蓝牙、Zigbee、蜂窝（3G/4G/5G）及其他射频设备均在适用范围内。5GHz Wi-Fi及其他许可频段无线技术须另行取得SCCT频率许可。申请人须提交技术文件及经认可实验室出具的测试报告。俄语技术文件一般可被接受。产品须在进口并于塔吉克斯坦销售前完成核准。
summary.zht: 所有投放塔吉克斯坦市場的無線電及電信終端設備，均須取得SCCT（通信、通信與信息技術服務——Хизмати алоқа, коммуникатсия ва технологияҳои иттилоотӣ）的型號核准，並在適用情況下取得頻率許可。SCCT負責塔吉克斯坦無線電頻譜管理及電信監管。SCCT型號核准是塔吉克斯坦特有的國家要求，與任何基於EAEU的核准完全分離——塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國，TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC標誌不適用。Wi-Fi（2.4GHz及5GHz）、藍牙、Zigbee、蜂窩（3G/4G/5G）及其他射頻設備均在適用範圍內。5GHz Wi-Fi及其他許可頻段無線技術須另行取得SCCT頻率許可。申請人須提交技術文件及經認可實驗室出具的測試報告。俄語技術文件一般可被接受。產品須在進口並於塔吉克斯坦銷售前完成核准。

standards_or_laws: Law of the Republic of Tajikistan No. 58 'On Communications' (as amended) — establishes mandatory licensing and type approval for telecom and radio equipment
SCCT — Service for Communications, Communications and Telecommunications of the Republic of Tajikistan — radio spectrum management and telecom regulatory authority
GOST-TR (Tajik state standards, TR prefix) — Tajikistan national standards largely mirroring GOST-R, IEC, and ISO frameworks
SCCT frequency permit requirement for 5 GHz Wi-Fi and licensed-band radio technologies in Tajikistan

summary.en: Chinese wireless devices are subject to SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission of China) radio type approval for radio transmission modules and equipment, administered under MIIT. Devices using Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and other radio frequencies must obtain an SRRC approval number before sale in China. Terminal equipment (routers, modems, cellular devices) additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Chinese SRRC approval and NAL are not recognised by SCCT and do not substitute for Tajikistan type approval or frequency permits. Test data generated to Chinese standards (GB 15629.11 for Wi-Fi, YD/T series for cellular) may support submissions but re-evaluation by an SCCT-accepted accredited laboratory is typically required.
summary.zh: 中国无线设备须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC，工业和信息化部下属）的无线电型号核准，适用于无线电发射模块及设备。使用Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及其他射频的设备须在中国销售前取得SRRC核准号。终端设备（路由器、调制解调器、蜂窝设备）还须额外取得工业和信息化部网络接入许可证（NAL）。中国SRRC核准和NAL不被SCCT承认，不可替代塔吉克斯坦型号核准或频率许可。依据中国标准（Wi-Fi适用GB 15629.11，蜂窝适用YD/T系列）产生的测试数据可作为支撑，但通常仍需由SCCT认可实验室重新评估。
summary.zht: 中國無線設備須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC，工業和信息化部下屬）的無線電型號核准，適用於無線電發射模組及設備。使用Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及其他射頻的設備須在中國銷售前取得SRRC核准號。終端設備（路由器、調製解調器、蜂窩設備）還須額外取得工業和信息化部網絡接入許可證（NAL）。中國SRRC核准和NAL不被SCCT承認，不可替代塔吉克斯坦型號核准或頻率許可。依據中國標準（Wi-Fi適用GB 15629.11，蜂窩適用YD/T系列）產生的測試數據可作為支撐，但通常仍需由SCCT認可實驗室重新評估。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission of China (MIIT), mandatory for radio transmission equipment sold in China
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, mandatory for telecom terminal equipment sold in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology — Telecommunications and information exchange between systems — WLAN / Wi-Fi
YD/T series — Ministry of Industry and Information Technology telecom terminal equipment standards (cellular)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC approval and MIIT NAL are not recognised by SCCT and cannot be used as substitutes for Tajikistan radio type approval or frequency permits. A separate SCCT type approval application must be filed, supported by test reports from an accredited laboratory accepted by SCCT. A dedicated SCCT frequency permit is required for 5 GHz Wi-Fi and other licensed-band technologies — this is a separate application from the type approval itself. Products sold in Tajikistan without valid SCCT type approval are subject to market withdrawal, customs seizure, and administrative penalties. Tajikistan is not in the EAEU, so EAC marking under TR EAEU 037/2016 provides no recognition advantage. The China-Tajikistan Belt and Road trade corridor has grown significantly, but Chinese regulatory approvals are not mutually recognised.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC核准和工业和信息化部NAL不被SCCT承认，不可用于替代塔吉克斯坦无线电型号核准或频率许可。须单独向SCCT提交型号核准申请，并附上SCCT认可实验室出具的测试报告。5GHz Wi-Fi及其他许可频段技术须取得单独的SCCT频率许可——该申请与型号核准申请相互独立。未取得有效SCCT型号核准而在塔吉克斯坦销售的产品，将面临市场下架、海关扣押及行政处罚。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国，因此TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC标志不提供任何承认优势。中塔「一带一路」贸易走廊已显著扩大，但中国监管核准不存在互认机制。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC核准和工業和信息化部NAL不被SCCT承認，不可用於替代塔吉克斯坦無線電型號核准或頻率許可。須單獨向SCCT提交型號核准申請，並附上SCCT認可實驗室出具的測試報告。5GHz Wi-Fi及其他許可頻段技術須取得單獨的SCCT頻率許可——該申請與型號核准申請相互獨立。未取得有效SCCT型號核准而在塔吉克斯坦銷售的產品，將面臨市場下架、海關扣押及行政處罰。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國，因此TR EAEU 037/2016下的EAC標誌不提供任何承認優勢。中塔「一帶一路」貿易走廊已顯著擴大，但中國監管核准不存在互認機制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SCCT radio type approval required for all radio and telecom terminal equipment before import and sale in Tajikistan; separate frequency permit required for 5 GHz Wi-Fi and licensed-band technologies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (and MIIT NAL for terminal equipment) required before sale in China

source.publisher: SCCT — Service for Communications, Communications and Telecommunications of the Republic of Tajikistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SCCT radio type approval is mandatory for all Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, and IoT radio devices sold in Tajikistan. A separate SCCT frequency permit is required for 5 GHz Wi-Fi. Chinese SRRC approval does not substitute. Tajikistan is not in the EAEU — EAC marking is irrelevant. A dedicated SCCT application with test reports from an accredited laboratory is required before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SCCT无线电型号核准对所有在塔吉克斯坦销售的Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝及物联网无线设备为强制要求。5GHz Wi-Fi须另行取得SCCT频率许可。中国SRRC核准不可替代。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成员国——EAC标志不适用。进口前须提交附有认可实验室测试报告的专项SCCT申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SCCT無線電型號核准對所有在塔吉克斯坦銷售的Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩及物聯網無線設備為強制要求。5GHz Wi-Fi須另行取得SCCT頻率許可。中國SRRC核准不可替代。塔吉克斯坦非EAEU成員國——EAC標誌不適用。進口前須提交附有認可實驗室測試報告的專項SCCT申請。
